news.headline: DigitalBridge chooses HUB for NAV Oversight, optimizes processes, reduces manual work, and enhances accuracy.
news.summary: In Boca Raton, Florida, HUB has revealed that DigitalBridge has chosen their HUB NAV Oversight SaaS solution to enhance their NAV processes. DigitalBridge, a major global alternative asset manager focused on digital infrastructure investments, has adopted HUB NAV Oversight to streamline their NAV oversight workflows and enhance accuracy. This move aims to reduce manual processes and improve efficiency. DigitalBridge's decision to utilize HUB NAV Oversight demonstrates the company's commitment to optimizing and automating their NAV processes for better scalability.

news.headline: Global market for Advanced Materials for 3D Printing to grow at CAGR of 18.1% by 2029, driven by aerospace, automotive, medical sectors.
news.summary: A recent report by BCC Research highlights the significant growth underway in the 3D printing materials market, driven primarily by the aerospace, automotive, and medical industries. The study indicates that the global market for Advanced Materials for 3D Printing is on a steep upward trajectory, with an estimated value of [specific number] by [year]. This rapid expansion is also being fueled by sustainable innovations within the sector.

news.headline: US House Speaker Johnson expects to see deregulation under Trump's second term.
Johnson: Trump to use tariffs as a negotiating tactic.
Block CEO Jack Dorsey wears 'Satoshi' T-Shirt at Africa Bitcoin Conference in Kenya from Dec. 9 to 11, promoting Bitcoin adoption in Africa.
news.summary: Jack Dorsey, CEO and co-founder of Block Inc., recently visited Kenya to participate in the Africa Bitcoin Conference set to occur in Nairobi from December 9 to 11. Dorsey had expressed his support for the conference during a Bitcoin event in Portugal earlier in April and is now fulfilling his commitment to attend its third installment. The conference's primary objectives are to increase Bitcoin adoption throughout Africa and enhance connections within the global community. During the event in Madeira, Dorsey commended the conference's endeavors to raise awareness and encourage the use of Bitcoin in Africa, recognizing the continent's potential for Bitcoin to have a substantial positive impact on people's lives. Dorsey will be speaking at the conference.

news.headline: Possible threat to Satoshi Nakamoto's 1M Bitcoin due to quantum computing, leading to discussions on freezing to protect network.
news.summary: The security of Satoshi Nakamoto's 1 million Bitcoin is being questioned due to advancements in quantum computing technology. This has led to discussions about potentially freezing at-risk holdings in order to protect the future of the network.

news.headline: Bitcoin experiences highest liquidations since 2021, wiping $1.6B in a "crazy" reset, as crypto liquidations rise due to Coinbase actions.
news.summary: A surge in Bitcoin and cryptocurrency liquidations has been observed as "unusual" conditions emerged following Coinbase traders selling off a significant amount of BTC. The liquidations of digital assets have escalated as a result, with large amounts being offloaded in the market. This situation has caught the attention of many in the industry, with the total sum of liquidated assets reaching a substantial figure. Market analysts are closely monitoring these developments to understand the implications and potential impact on the cryptocurrency market.

news.headline: Convertible bonds issued by Hexagon Purus ASA have had their conversion prices adjusted.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Oslo, Norway, Hexagon Purus ASA's convertible bonds with ISIN NO0012851858 ("First Convertible Bonds") and ISIN NO0013106732 ("Second Convertible Bonds") were referenced. The Company issued these bonds.

news.headline: Vodafone Idea partners with Tejas Networks for 3-year backhaul capacity growth for 4G and 5G; Tejas to supply TJ1400 and TJ1600.
news.summary: Tejas Networks, an India-based company listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange under the code 540595 and the National Stock Exchange under the code TEJASNET, revealed on December 10, 2024, that they have secured a significant deal with Vodafone Idea Limited (VIL), a prominent telecom service provider in India. The contract spans over three years and involves the provision of Tejas Networks' cutting-edge products TJ1400 and TJ1600 to VIL.

news.headline: Remcom integrates Huygens Antennas for dynamic scenarios to analyze on-body electromagnetic effects. Dec. 10, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: The integration of XFdtd and Wireless InSite enables the inclusion of near-field antenna effects in simulations for improved analysis of antenna performance in real-world scenarios. This allows for the study of mobility, multipath, and interactions with body-worn devices. This development was announced in State College, Pennsylvania, on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: tukom and Elsight join forces to bring communications tech to DACH region, integrating various channels for defense.
news.summary: Elsight, an Israeli company, has collaborated with tukom in Germany to introduce a cutting-edge unmanned connectivity platform for defense operations in Schondorf. The platform combines various communication channels and has been proven effective on the battlefield. This partnership, disclosed on December 10, 2024, is based on a joint effort to enhance operational capabilities. Elsight, listed on the Australian Stock Exchange as ELS, aims to leverage its expertise in this collaboration.

news.headline: Jacobs appointed to UK's United Utilities Specialist Network Modeling Framework, supporting asset optimization and resilience.
news.summary: Jacobs, a leading company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol J, has been selected by United Utilities for a significant project in North West England. This initiative marks the most substantial investment in water and wastewater infrastructure in the region in the past 100 years. The project aims to enhance asset optimization and resilience within the sector. United Utilities, a major player in the industry, has entrusted Jacobs to drive this endeavor forward, showcasing the scale and importance of this collaboration.

news.headline: Farsight Partners and AB CarVal partner for $1 billion investment in specialty finance for insurance.
news.summary: Two organizations are partnering to explore specialty finance options in the life and health insurance sector. Farsight Partners, an insurance specialty finance investment adviser based in London, UK, has recently signed a deal with funds overseen by AB CarVal. The collaboration, announced on December 10, 2024, aims to capitalize on opportunities within the industry and leverage their expertise in this field. This partnership signifies a significant step forward in this sector, with both parties pooling their resources and experience to drive growth and innovation.

news.headline: Ellucian partners with Stu3 to transform higher education in the UK, streamlining system upgrades.
news.summary: A new strategic partnership has been revealed between Ellucian, a top provider of higher education technology solutions, and Stu3, to enhance student information system modernizations for institutions in the UK. This alliance, announced on December 10, 2024, aims to streamline processes and improve efficiency for educational institutions nationwide. Ellucian's expertise in the field combined with Stu3's resources will work towards driving advancements in student data management systems. This collaboration is anticipated to have a significant impact on institutions across the UK, bringing about enhancements in the education sector.

news.headline: NR1 Webshops recognized among "20 Most Innovative Companies to Watch, 2024" by Business Worldwide Magazine. Celebrating forward-thinking companies.
news.summary: A London-based company, NR1 Webshops, has recently been named as one of the standout "20 Most Innovative Companies to Watch, 2024" by Business Worldwide Magazine. This accolade highlights NR1 Webshops for its visionary approach and groundbreaking initiatives that are making a significant impact on various industries. Being included in this prestigious list signifies the company's commitment to innovation and strategic foresight.

news.headline: MYCOM OSI unveils MycomEye app beta for real-time access to Network, Service, and Business Data. Leading provider to CSPs.
news.summary: In London on December 10, 2024, a significant announcement was made by MYCOM OSI, a renowned company offering Network Assurance and Service Experience Assurance solutions to top communications service providers globally. The company introduced the MycomEye mobile app beta, providing immediate observability for a more seamless experience.

news.headline: CloudPay achieves Platinum Partner status with Workday, showcasing leadership in global payroll solutions.
news.summary: In Andover, England on December 10, 2024, CloudPay, a top provider of global payroll and payment services, has been honored with the title of Platinum Partner by Workday, Inc. This exclusive accolade is reserved for a limited number of partners and underscores the robust collaboration between the two companies.

news.headline: Vantage Markets wins 'Most Trusted Broker' & 'Best CSR' at Prof. Traders Awards 2024, showing commitment.
news.summary: A prominent CFD broker, Vantage Markets, based in Sydney, was honored with the titles of "Most Trusted Broker" and "Best Corporate Social Responsibility" at the 2024 Professional Trader Awards. This recognition highlights Vantage's strong dedication to its clients and social responsibility initiatives. The awards reaffirm Vantage's position as a leader in the industry, showcasing their commitment to excellence and ethical business practices.

news.headline: Vantage Markets wins "Most Trusted Broker" & "Best CSR" at Professional Trader Awards 2024. Celebrates in Vanuatu.
news.summary: In Port Vila, Vanuatu on December 10, 2024, a multi-asset broker, Vantage Markets, was honored with the titles of "Most Trusted Broker" and "Best Corporate Social Responsibility" at the Professional Trader Awards 2024 ceremony. This recognition highlights Vantage's dedication to excellence in the industry.

news.headline: Techstars and WirelessCar partner for Connected Mobility Innovation Program to propel future mobility. (Characters: 89)
news.summary: A program named Techstars & WirelessCar Connected Mobility Innovation Program has been launched in Gothenburg, Sweden on December 10, 2024. The collaboration between pre-seed investor Techstars and connected vehicle services provider WirelessCar aims to drive innovation in future mobility. This program will focus on empowering the automotive industry with advanced technologies and services.

news.headline: Solana (SOL) price drops today due to significant decline in Solana-based tokens, signaling correction isn't done yet.
news.summary: Today, the price of SOL has decreased due to a significant drop in Solana-based tokens. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) also indicates a bearish divergence, signaling that the correction may not be complete. This decline comes amidst a challenging market environment, with SOL experiencing a notable decrease in value.

news.headline: FirstOntario Credit Union partners with Temenos to provide improved digital experience. Aim is to deliver personalized services to Canadian consumers & businesses.
news.summary: The credit union has announced that they will be leveraging Temenos Digital to provide Canadian consumers and businesses with enhanced, personalized services and seamless experiences. This move is aimed at improving customer journeys and ensuring consistency in services offered. With this initiative, the credit union aims to cater to the growing needs of its clientele in Canada by leveraging the advanced capabilities of Temenos Digital.

news.headline: Bitcoin witnesses highest liquidations since 2021, $1.6B wiped in 'crazy' reset after Coinbase traders sell BTC.
news.summary: A surge of Bitcoin and cryptocurrency liquidations has occurred due to "unusual" circumstances originating from Coinbase traders selling off BTC. This sudden event has led to a significant increase in liquidations across the market, with a noticeable impact on the overall financial landscape. The exact numbers regarding the liquidations and the extent of their effects remain undisclosed, but experts suggest that the situation is noteworthy and could potentially influence the cryptocurrency market in the near future.

news.headline: South Korea's Presidential Office when asked who is running South Korea: We have no official position to offer.
Ashtead relocates primary listing to US in latest setback for London, shaking up financial market.
Vancouver mayor advocates Bitcoin use to combat inflation, emphasizing its role in securing financial stability.
news.summary: Mayor Ken Sim of Vancouver is encouraging the city to consider adopting Bitcoin due to its ability to protect financial stability against fiat inflation.

news.headline: US-German bond spread set to remain wide, says Walsh in Bloomberg news.
EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS announced distribution of up to 1,000,000 new shares with subscription period from Nov 21, 2024 to Dec 06, 2024.
news.summary: The Supervisory Board of EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS has decided to raise the share capital by issuing a maximum of 1,000,000 new ordinary shares of the fund. The resolution was passed on November 11, 2024. The subscription period for these shares commenced on November 21, 2024, and concluded on December 06, 2024. The company's registry code is 12864036, located at A. Lauteri 5, 10114 Tallinn.

news.headline: Synaptics releases SYN20708 SoC supporting Bluetooth 5.4 and IEEE 802.15.4, with capabilities to connect to multiple endpoints simultaneously.
news.summary: The SYN20708 is designed to support Bluetooth Classic, BLE, Zigbee, and Thread all at the same time. This allows for simultaneous connections to various endpoints in heterogeneous network settings. This feature enables seamless connectivity across different platforms and devices.

news.headline: German Engineering Group VDMA sees intensified competition in China and expects new challenges in the US.
Huize Holding Limited reveals Q3 2024 financial results; leading insurance platform in Asia, connects consumers and partners digitally.
news.summary: Huize Holding Limited, a prominent insurance technology platform based in Shenzhen, China, disclosed its unaudited financial results for the third quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The company, listed as HUIZ on the NASDAQ stock exchange, specializes in connecting consumers, insurance companies, and distribution partners through innovative digital solutions driven by data and artificial intelligence.

German Engineering Group VDMA: For the first time in many years there is a risk of slight job cuts.
InterDigital's Dong Tian recognized as IEEE Fellow for contributions to 3D video with expertise in compression and processing.
news.summary: Dong Tian, a member of InterDigital, has recently been recognized as an IEEE Fellow for his exceptional achievements in the fields of 3D video compression, processing, and analysis. This prestigious title is awarded to individuals who have made significant contributions to the advancement of technology. Tian's expertise and dedication have greatly impacted the industry, making him a respected figure in the field. This recognition further validates his valuable contributions and highlights his importance in the realm of technology.

news.headline: NTT Group in Japan selects Evidian Identity Governance & Administration for their identity management system.
Node4 appoints Richard Moseley as CEO, founder Andy Gilbert becomes President, in move to boost executive team and growth.
news.summary: Node4, a cloud-focused Managed Services Provider based in Derby, England, has revealed the appointment of Richard Moseley as its new CEO. This change comes as part of Node4's plan to bolster its leadership team for future expansion. Founder and former CEO Andy Gilbert will now serve as the President and a member of the board. The move aims to facilitate a smooth transition and ensure continuity in Node4's operations. The company is gearing up for the next stage of growth under Moseley's leadership.

news.headline: Xsolla partners with Red Bull Gaming Sphere in the UK to support game developers at December 11 event.
news.summary: Xsolla, a prominent global video game commerce company, has been revealed as the Official Supporting Partner (Payment Solutions) for the Office Hours event at Red Bull Gaming Sphere on December 11th. This event will take place at the Red Bull Gaming Sphere in Shoreditch, London. It will feature co-working spaces, expert panel discussions, and game showcases to facilitate opportunities for developers to enhance their skills and expand their presence in the UK.

news.headline: Tricentis establishes new Dubai office to enhance growth strategy in Middle East.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from Dubai, Tricentis has inaugurated a new office in the United Arab Emirates, as part of its strategic vision for expanding in the region in the next year.

Clean Motion partners with LMe Solutions to introduce EVIG in The Netherlands for sustainable urban mobility, focusing on progressive emission policies.
news.summary: Clean Motion has recently revealed a new collaboration with LMe Solutions, a top Last Mile Experience Solutions firm located in Amsterdam. The partnership aims to introduce EVIG into the urban mobility sector in The Netherlands. This move is significant given the country's push towards more sustainable practices, with a focus on reducing emissions. This partnership is set to bring about positive changes in the urban mobility landscape, offering promising prospects for a cleaner and more environmentally-friendly mode of transportation in the country.

news.headline: YANGGUOFU Malatang debuts in Berlin with European MALA GALA festival spreading Eastern cuisine culture overseas. Over 10 European countries already have branches.
news.summary: In Berlin, the YANGGUOFU Malatang European Spicy Festival, known as “MALA GALA,” commenced on December 5th with a brand image overhaul. The event's theme, “Culture as Wings, Fragrance Spreads Worldwide,” signifies its goal to promote Eastern cuisine globally. YANGGUOFU, launched its first store in Spain in 2023, has expanded rapidly across 10 European nations, garnering praise. The festival, MALA GALA, celebrates the brand's growth and aims to showcase the company's dedication to sharing Eastern culinary traditions abroad.

Earnings report on December 10, 2024:- Designer Brands: $0.35 per share, $802.14M revenue- ImmunoPrecise Antibodies: Loss at $0.07/share, $4.77M revenue- G-III Apparel Group: $2.27 per share, $1.10B revenue- AutoZone: $33.69 per share, $4.31B revenue- Academy Sports: $1.28 per share, $1.38B revenue
news.summary: Several companies are set to report their quarterly earnings before the bell, with the following expectations:- Designer Brands (NYSE:DBI): Estimated to report earnings of $0.35 per share on revenue of $802.14 million.- ImmunoPrecise Antibodies (NASDAQ:IPA): Expected to report a quarterly loss of $0.07 per share on revenue of $4.77 million.- G-III Apparel Group (NASDAQ:GIII): Likely to report earnings of $2.27 per share on revenue of $1.10 billion.- LightInTheBox Holding (NYSE:LITB) and Huize Holding (NASDAQ:HUIZ) are both anticipated to report earnings for the third quarter.- AutoZone (NYSE:AZO): Estimated to report quarterly earnings of $33.69 per share on revenue totaling $4.31 billion.- Academy Sports (NASDAQ:ASO): Expected to post quarterly earnings of $1.28 per share on revenue of $1.38 billion.- Vince Holding (NYSE:VNCE) is also included in the lineup. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Investors of Microsoft and Amazon consider Bitcoin investments after MicroStrategy's success.Key Points: Microsoft may invest 1% of assets in Bitcoin, Amazon evaluating 5% allocation.
news.summary: Investors in Microsoft Corp. (NASDAQ:MSFT) and Amazon.com Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) are contemplating ventures into Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) following significant gains seen by MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) from its bitcoin approach. Microsoft shareholders will vote on Dec. 10 on a proposal to view bitcoin as an asset on their balance sheets. The proposal, backed by the National Center for Public Policy Research, suggests holding at least 1% of assets in bitcoin as a hedge against inflation. A similar recommendation has been put forward for Amazon to invest 5% of its assets in bitcoin. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Israeli Military Spokesperson denies incursion into Syria has reached 25 KM from Damascus: Israeli forces have not gone outside the buffer zone.
Luigi Mangione charged with murder in UnitedHealthcare shooting | Daybreak: Europe 12/10/2024
news.summary: Luigi Mangione has been charged with murder in connection to the shooting at UnitedHealthcare. The incident occurred on December 10, 2024, in Daybreak, Europe. The accused individual is facing serious charges in relation to the tragic event. The precise details and circumstances surrounding the shooting are still under investigation. The specific numbers related to the incident, including casualties or injuries, have not been provided at this time.
